Event: Cornucopia Island March 2025
Event Date: 19/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A209
Cold Calculation

Triggers: 3 sec

Ice Strike
The unit launches a frost orb at a random enemy. The orb bounces up to 4 times. Once the sphere hits the target, it triggers one of the following effects:
- The target has a 35% chance of going into deep freeze for 3 sec. The frozen enemy is unable to move during this whole time, and the cooldown of all their abilities (except those granted by the set equipped) increases by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the target of the ability explodes and takes 300000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of it and into 2 nearby enemies. On hit, the icicles deal 250000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec, and subject them to stiffness. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 55% for 3 sec.
- The target has a 65% chance to take 200000 pure damage and become frozen for 3 sec. During this time, the target can't move or attack. It also increases the cooldown of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec. Also, during this time, the target can't restore health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
